name: Pro se in Chicago: access AEO docs?
description: **Motion court; demand first.** Pro se treated as attorney.[4]

mainEntity.name: Pro se in Chicago: access AEO docs?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Motion court; demand first.** Pro se treated as attorney.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **File motion to modify order for pro se access in Chicago courts.** Similar to CA; explain prep need.[4] Key factors: Attach demand letter refusal. Declaration under penalty. Agree to limits. Northern District IL rules apply. Local rules counsel.
